category_sources: Debian source package describes liblockfile1 as an NFS-safe locking library.
source_facts.description says it provides functions to lock standard mailboxes.
display_name_sources: Debian source package page names the source package liblockfile.
docs_sources: Official upstream GitHub repository README is the best available project documentation surface found.
source_facts.homepage points to Debian tracker/package information for liblockfile.
repo_sources: Debian source package External Resources links the upstream GitHub homepage for liblockfile.
FreshPorts references upstream changelog paths under github.com/miquels/liblockfile.
